_comment: Merge this into the .claude/settings.json of any repo you open through Drydock. The daemon injects DRYDOCK_SESSION_ID and DRYDOCK_DAEMON_URL into the session's environment. PreToolUse pipes Claude Code's payload to the daemon and returns the daemon's decision verbatim (curl -m 590 keeps us under Claude Code's ~600s hook ceiling so the daemon resolves first; widen the matcher e.g. "Bash|Write|Edit|WebFetch" to gate more tools). SessionStart (matcher "startup") asks the daemon for the ticket this session was spawned for and injects its body as additionalContext, so a ticket-spawned agent starts with the full ticket in context — the daemon returns an empty object for non-ticket sessions, which is a no-op.
